entry.title: Re: ML_GET_BLOCKED_INFO
entry.content: Been a while since my last post, but unfortunately still no resolution has been found for this issue. Thank you for the alter procedure statement, but it didn't help. Guess I'll need an actual DBA to try and run a trace to see what's calling ML_GET_BLOCKED_INFO, using the wrong number of arguments; maybe? I will say it is very aggravating when hitting this error during synchronization operations... Having to wait several minutes for it to release the worker thread(s). Regardless, a solution to this issue still alludes me. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Rework Process in Purchase Requisitions
entry.content:
Hi Partha,

thx a lot for this helpful blog.

I tried to rebuild your example but in my system the aprrover has no button "Request Rework" in the inbox although the correct task is triggered, any idea what could be the reason for it ?

Kind Regards

Falko

entry.title: Re: Dynamically hiding parameters AND selection texts

entry.title: Re: Error during installation of Plateau Report Designer...
entry.content:
Hi Deyana,

yes, you have to click a few times "Ignore" until finish.

Pay attention that is not working with the JRE 1.7 like presented in the SAP tutorial anymore, only with the latest Java 8.

BR

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS Based search models with Long Text support in S/4HANA on-premise
entry.content:
@Philip Have you managed to successfully implement a CDS-based search model?

I keep getting errors, like "'@UI' must be annotated (at header and elements) [Enterprise Search]", even though I follow all the recommendations and have annotated my fields accordingly. (I stripped everything down to two fields to make sure there is nothing else it could be complaining about).

entry.title: Re: Individual purchase requisitons from a single sales o...
entry.content:
• Go to STVARV
  • Create a variable name 
  • Under Selection Options, have combination of fields like sales org, order type, schedule line category

Now, add the logic in USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_ME_REQ in such a way that when an entry is created in VBAP or VBEP, each POSNR from VBAP to create a separate PR. 

By this approach, you are not hardcoding the logic in user exit where no need to depend on ABAP team to modify in case of Business requirement changes.  Super users can themselves change the field names or delete the entry if not required.

entry.title: Re: Why Are BRF+ Objects Inactive After Transporting from Development to Quality in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content: Have you checked for notes?

entry.content: (removed)

entry.title: Re: CDS Table Function cannot be activated ("renamed"?) a...

entry.title: BP Roles for InHouse Banking
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
As a part of In-House Bank set up, we are trying to add the BP roles IHB100 and IHB200 to the Business Partners.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b8e68a90bfff4ff0906d5db5342bdece/1ac485d510db46d1b9a084364b0d1479.html 

However, the SSCUI 103008 - Define BP Roles, doesn't provide a provision to add new BP Roles. Thus, could you kindly suggest any way on how these roles can be added first to the SSCUI, so that we can then add these roles to the Business Partners required for In-House Banking?

Could some scope item activation add these BP roles to the SSCUI automatically? If yes, which scope item?
Thanks in advance

entry.title: Set nobinpt via bdc_transaction (SAP standard form for bdc)?
entry.content:
I want to set nobinpt so that it does not get set as X when the BDC report is getting called. Currently, we are using bdc_transaction because we are also skipping the initial screen of PA30. Now, in this, we cannot set nobinpt so, I tried to set this via ctu_params and use the following instead of bdc_trasaction. 

CALL TRANSACTION ‘PA30’ USING bdc_data OPTIONS opt MESSAGES INTO mess tab.

now, the issue is that binpt is getting properly set, but the initial screen is not getting skipped, even though I have mentioned it properly in bdcdata.

Any suggestions on how to achieve this would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP Process Orchestration 7.5 - Large Message Handling
entry.content:
Hello Remyak,

Check with your Basis Team to increase server nodes it will process the message are fast.

entry.title: Adobe Document Services future Strategy
entry.content:
We know that ADS on-premise support will be ended at 2027.

What alternatives does SAP offer for on-premise ADS?
Will there be a new on-premise system to replace ADS, or will only cloud-based solutions be available?

We found a link about on-premise dedicator : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/maintenance-strategy-adobe-forms-on-premise/ba-p/13627957
"As announced at the DSAG Technology Days 2024 in Hamburg, SAP HANA Extended Application Services, Advanced Model (XSA) will be the successor platform for Adobe Document Services."
Could you verify this statement for this is valid in currently?

"SAP plans to deliver this option during the support time frame of the S/4HANA 2025 release."
Could you send me more details and information about it? For example S/4HANA 2025 will containe the XSA with ADS functionality? How can we imagine the new on-premise architecture?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP Query output to Internal table.
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't understand the solution.

Can you please explain how you solve this ?

Thanks in advance;

entry.title: Re: How to use Plugin's efficiently to derive your calculations
entry.content: @DK08: First thing, how can you find multiple Sales transactions with attributes to update it in each position in SMR rule ?? Its not possible.  If you have per credit or per-incentive rule... it can be updated from Sales transaction attributes to 1n1 for Plugin..

Do you know if we could test STO process in a service order. If yes where can i define source and target storage location

regards

Sambit

entry.content: Has there been an Update to the solution of this issue?

entry.title: Re: How to use Plugin's efficiently to derive your calculations

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager Gis Enhancement
entry.content: Hi muhammad_rafay! Thanks for the answer. In my case have a functional location with a bigger geometry and a work order for this functional location. And inside this functional location geometry, i have the 5 equipment in five different points. In addition, we have others functional location and equipments that appears on map in others coordinates. We want to see in the map when selecting the order, the order geometry that will be the same as functional location, and the equipments geometry installed in this func location. Example: Selecting in search bar the order number and it finds the order, functional location and equipments installed. Do you know if this is possible to enhance? Best Regards Rafael Eij Umeda

entry.title: Re: ICMR How can we manage the CLEARING STATUS = 3 in the matching rules?
entry.content: it may be helpful if you could provide a specific examples, with amounts and G/L accounts etc.

entry.title: Re: Difference between Create Advance Return on Sales/Pur...
entry.content: Hi all, the fact that there's a difference from the preview and the print version is at least misleading, because normally the printing reflects what is shown on the screen, so at least this is not easy to accept from the customers. Let's give that the customer is fine with this system behavior, if we accept the page numbering shows on the screen and we let the system to update the table in CHECK VAT TOTAL AND PAGE NUMBER ITALY APP, the following month the system starts from the wrong page. This is what we had in one of our's customer's system, both on video and in the official print. Which is not compliant with the italian fiscal rules. Has anybody else had this problem? how did you manage it? we used ADVANCE RETURN TAX ON SALES APP. Many thanks for your support

entry.title: Updating SAP Partner CoE Quality Measurement Reporting After System Deletion
entry.content: I have deleted the systems from the SLD and LMDB, but I need to update the SAP Partner CoE Quality Measurement Reporting. I would like to know where this report pulls its information from. Additionally, is there a way to remove obsolete systems from the report? If so, how can this be done?

entry.title: Re: How to concatenate value in Global Variable
entry.content:
Hi @Pyae_Phyo_Thwe ,

When you write the global variable, in the following step, the name should be "PartialInvoiceID", because it is the name you are using when reading the global variable:

hope it helps!

Roberto

entry.title: Re: CDS Table Function cannot be activated ("renamed"?) a...
entry.content: @Nitin_Nala Please ask in the adequate thread (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/ass0ciate-consultant/qaq-p/13983157), not in other threads.

entry.title: And that's a wrap - SIT Madrid 2025
entry.content:
Last Friday, 21st of March, we restarted the SAP Inside Track "chapter" in Madrid. The day was full of interesting sessions, good food, and interesting networking opportunities.
 

 

Below, are the different talks that were part of the event:
  • 09:30 - Level up your CAP skills by learning how to use the cds repl ( @qmacro  )
  • 10:00 - Knowledge Graphs: From Fundamentals to Implementation with SAP S/4HANA and Enterprise Applications ( @Antonio_leites )
  • 10:30 - How SAP Cloud ALM helps you to implement and operate intelligent cloud and hybrid business solutions ( @maria_teresa_gutierrez )
  • 11:30 - SAP Business AI: Latest Breakthroughs and Future Prospects ( @salva_gimeno )
  • 12:00 - Code10 CI Accelerator - The Integration Suite Addon ( @Antonio_C10IT )
  • 12:30 - Building flexible Event-Driven Architectures with open standards ( @ajmaradiaga  )
  • 13:30 - Building a Personal AI Fitness Coach with SAP BTP, STRAVA, and Ollama GenAI ( @IgorNarodowy  )
  • 14:00 - Mastering Connectivity & Accelerating Integrations with prepackaged integration content ( @rcvblanco @and@sanderkool  )
  • 14:30 - SAP Customer Insights Dashboard ( @Lluis )

 

You weren't able to make it to the in-person event? That's not a problem. The entire day was live streamed on YouTube, meaning that you can watch the recordings of the different sessions.

Sessions from 09:30 - 11:00

Session from 11:30 - 13:00

Sessions from 13:30 - 15:00

Thanks to all our speakers and everyone who joined us in person and online. It was a great day and quite interesting to know other members of the SAP Community in Madrid. I'm already looking forward to the next SIT Madrid ;-).

entry.title: Re: Not Able to do Patch Request for API - API_PURCHASEORDER_2
entry.content: why not show the whole thing?

entry.title: Re: Group Report Doesn't Read Doc Type EE
entry.content:
Dear,

it does not look like you need to aggregate and release P&L closing entries.

assuming it looks like Dr. all revenues, Cr all expenses, Cr Net profit.

In GR, there is a task in data monitor to do just that, to calculate net profit per period.

why would these entries needed in GR? and what make you think they are not in GR? because document types fields are not typically available in GR

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements using RAP Model
entry.content: When I try to run the app, data is not being fetched. What can be the issue?

entry.title: Re: Hi Priyanka,Just like UPDATE_INSERT, Do SAP CPI suppo...
entry.content:
Hi,

No it doesn't exist, here you have the existing operations:

https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/payload-and-operation

Regards,

Roberto

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
Hello @Gopinath ,

Fundamentally what I was trying to get at is the real world human impact of requiring Onboardees to login to SF via IAS.

No doubt the IAS login should be configured correctly so there’s no errors when logging in.

However correct configuration doesn’t change the fact that the real world steps that the Onboardees need to take just to login via IAS are *numerous and by definition inherently difficult*.

Absolutely every Onboardee in the world has to somehow know exactly what to do in sequence, just to login to SuccessFactors: Receive email, Activate IAS, download authenticator with their mobile device, scan QR code etc. Failure to complete any step will result in inability to login to SuccessFactors.

 

What I was saying is also the fact that Onboardees are not even employees at the time of doing this login to SF. Technical support may not be readily accessible to help them to even login in the SF. This is a risk factor as they may even give up trying to login to SF.

Of course you or any one in SAP won’t find any difficulty in activating IAS and logging in to SF. After all, you are an expert from SAP.

But here we are talking about countless Onboardees around the world, with different experiences with technology (let alone SAP IAS), different education level, etc, all forced to somehow know the required steps to login to SF via IAS. Also you mention logging in to Gmail etc: Gmail does not require users to download an Authenticator app, scan QR code etc.

Think about the real world human impact on the ground

Best Regards

Ernest Lin

entry.title: Re: IDOC Extension
entry.content: I'm again repeating, do the segments respect the structure defined by the IDoc type in WE30? If you can't compare by yourself, attach the screenshots of WE02 segment structure and WE30 segment structure.

entry.title: Re: CDS Hierarchy Directory: How to use NOTASSIGNEDNODE Annotation to suppress or to filter the Not
entry.content:
Hi,

'@HIERARCHY.NOTASSIGNEDNODE.SUPPRESSINDICATOR' supposed to set in the hierarchy directory view not in query.

Custom CDS Views,  does not support hierarchy yet.

entry.title: Delete Homepage Career Site Builder
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

this is my first post. 
We got bad advice from an agency to do like a "this page is not available in your language" - Homepage on every Homepage of a brand that is not the language that we need in this brand. So e.g. we have the Brand Default and we just want to use this for english for a global Homepage. But know every language we have, we have a landing page in the brand default with "this is not available".

Can we delete that page that is already published. I know you can delete category and content pages, but there is no delete button for the homepage / startpage itself. 

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: Access to Purchased SAP Learning Hub to do stay curre...

hello @sunilgr,

Just curious what are your reasons for the preferences to use basic SF login for Onboardees despite having IAS setup for SF?

Best Regards

Ernest Lin

GAnjos

entry.title: Main URL in Recruiting
entry.content:
Dear experts

One of my customers is worried about the SEO of their main page, because they get (before implementing recruiting) around 50k clicks to their main page and when they implement Recruiting with the new and external link, that traffic will be lost from the main page.

Is there any way this can be solved? Proxy, any other suggestions/links?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Fiori App F6991 – Project Cost O...
entry.content: You should follow up with SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content: Agree with you Ernest. It makes a huge difference in the user experience and also the frustration if they are unable to complete onboarding on time. System needs to be easy to access, navigate and mobile friendly yet secure.

entry.title: Re: ZR35 Rule error
entry.content: For that PERNR and for the Day the error happens (21.03.2025), execute pt60 with the "Display Log" box checked. You should then be able to see exactly in which PCR and after which Operation the error happens. Please post a screen capture of that so that we could help you since pcr ZR35 is a Custom PCR, and the error could happen during the processing of any Operation it contains.

entry.title: Re: SAP GROUP REPORTING CONFIGURATION STEPS
entry.content:
Dear,

I would recommend to look for GR learning journal on learning hub

SAP GROUP REPORTING LEARNING - SAP Community

also check 2659672 - FAQ About SAP S/4HANA Finance for Group Reporting (On Premise) - SAP for Me

in addition https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4ebf1502064b406c964b0911adfb3f01/c27c73226dac4e07ac8aa59a45f92fd8.html?locale=en-US

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Re: ZR35 Rule error
entry.content: Drill down into your Time Evaluation Log to see what sequence of Operations generate the ERROR.

entry.title: remove the navigation arrow button from the macros based table inside a dialog
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm using macro table of type responsive table inside a dialog. But I'm seeing this navigation arrow at the rightmost end of all the rows.

I am not using the rowpress event. is there any way to remove it through controller or any annotation in the presentation variant? I'm not able to find any property on API reference page which can be used to disable it.

fragment definition:

<core:FragmentDefinition
    xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" 
    xmlns:table="sap.ui.table" xmlns:macrosTable="sap.fe.macros.table" xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros">
    <Dialog id="changesDialogTable">
        <content>
            <macrosTable:Table
                id="changesTable"
                metaPath="/PurchaseOrderChanges/@UI.PresentationVariant"     
                readOnly="true"
                personalization ="false"
                isSearchable = "false"
                enableAutoColumnWidth = "true"
                type ="ResponsiveTable"
                disableCopyToClipboard = "true"
                beforeRebindTable=".tableRefreshed"> 
            </macrosTable:Table>
        </content>
        <beginButton>
            <Button id="closeButtonTable" text="{i18n>close}" press="onCloseChangesDialogTable" />
        </beginButton>
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>


Could anyone help please.

Thank you,
Keval

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content: @ernlin -just a client preference. They want to keep it simple ,hassle free and low maintenance.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA Cloud ERP ON SAAS Model
entry.content: So this means that the company that acquires the use of SAP Hana Cloud can no longer consider it as a fixed asset?

entry.title: Re: Playing around with Log segment states of log volumes in HANA
entry.content: superb.

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content:
@Damien_Barnes All the partners who participated in the Webinar already get a link with recording and slides.

 

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/psd/2025/feb/e_oe_te_w_PSD_WEB_00009223.html Partners can access this link too.

entry.title: Re: Intercompany billing: can price date be taken from Bi...
entry.content: By default, system will consider billing date which is nothing but Actual Goods Issue date as pricing date in inter company billing.  If that is not happening in your case, check the copy control VTFL for the field "Price Source"

entry.title: Re: Sec 603 automatically move catch-up contributions to...
entry.content: Here is SAP's answer

entry.title: Re: Sec 603 automatically move catch-up contributions to...
entry.content: Updated 25.03.2025 at 08:57 by SAP Agent Info for Customer Proposed Solution: Hello Agnes, Currently SAP does not have a process of automatic plan selection and there are no plans to deliver a functionality with this option. As it is necessary to have different configuration for pos-tax and pre-tax plans in the benefits tables, it is not possible for the same plan to converted from pre-tax to post-tax. That said, as it would be necessary to have two different plans and there can exists multiple plans configured in an environment, currently there is no way to know which of the existing plans available in the system should be used for an employee, preventing an automatically plan selection. Since Product support channel is designated for technical/functional issues with an standard SAP product and this case is related to the request of a new functionality, please consider reaching out to your consulting team directly for further help on this case, since this is a consulting issue. You may refer to the KBA 0000083020 - "What is consulting - What is support? and 0001054121 - The SAP Ecosystem in a Nutshell Best Regards, Gisele Technical Support - SuccessFactors HCM SAP Support

entry.title: Dimension labels not shown (treemap, heatmap)
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have a Treemap Chart in one case and a Heatmap Chart in the other case, both used as mobile stories where we do not see all labels of all dimensions.

In the Treemap, depending on the size of the segment, I suppose, the label is not displayed.

In the Heatmap example there are three labels for the dimensions on the x Axis missing: Milk, Complementary food, Care. 

Without changing the size of the widget, does anybody see a way how to ensure that all labels are displayed even though that would mean overlapping or scaling the content to a very small font size? And second, is this bahaviour by design, i. e. would it make sense to open a Customer Influence request for it?

Please refer to attached files.   

Thanks for your thoughts and comments,

Christa

entry.title: Re: AI in SAP
entry.content:
Hello @Arpitchauhan , 
Right now, AI in SAP is already integrated into all SAP SaaS. 
My suggestion as a starting point is to go to the discovery center and review the AI Session with all use cases and missions to study. https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/index.html

entry.title: Re: And that's a wrap - SIT Madrid 2025

Haciendo un poco de spam 🤣 dejo por aquí mi opinión sobre el evento: https://aancos.com/2025/03/25/sap-inside-track-madrid-2025/

El año que viene, más y mejor 👋

entry.title: HANA SAML authentication when SDI is in use
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

As per the below SAP note, SAML authentication is not supported when SDI is used. Could you please check if it is on the roadmap for SDI to enable SAML authentication?

3575850 - HANA User Authentication Mechanisms in SDI


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: HANA SAML authentication when SDI is in use
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

You can check out the SDI roadmap here:

2447413 - Interested in new features for SAP HANA Smart Data Integration?

SDI Roadmap

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Adobe Document Services future Strategy
entry.content:
Text right from the blog you linked - Customers can then decide to switch from the ADS on NetWeaver AS Java to SAP Forms service by Adobe or the ADS on XSA. This guarantees long-term support of Adobe-based forms functionality for S/4 HANA on-premise solutions.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
@sunilgr  Exactly! It should be hassle free. But soon SAP is going to sunset this basic SF login for Onboardees.

Imagine the HR teams that will be bombarded by how-to questions from Onboardees.

Worse, Onboardees can just ghost the company due to these technical difficulties and give up joining the company!

As anyone can imagine, first impressions are important. The SF Onboarding product team of all people should fully appreciate this. Any adverse interaction that the new hire or pre-joiner has with the company has an outsized impact on their impression of the company due to the limited interactions they have had with the company thus far.

Companies need to treat pre-joiners with care as pre-joiners by definition have inherent flight-risks or risk of no show. The last thing anyone wants is for the technical hassles of login via IAS to be a contributing factor to their frustrations and decision not to join the company.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps web preview stopped working suddenly
entry.content: @Irk  I sent you a private message, please check your inbox 🙂

entry.title: Inventory and Lot Serial Number
entry.content:
Good morning, dear friends.
I need your help with the following problem. We want to assign a batch serial number to each of our products in production. I've attached an image of a product as an example.

In that image we see that the product must be assigned a batch number when entering the product, which is what happens in the following image.

Everything works perfectly from the SAP frontend, but we do the production load from an API that works perfectly as follows.

https://xxxxxxxx/b1s/v1/InventoryGenEntries
{
“DocumentLines”: [
{
“ItemCode”: “410224”,
“Quantity”: 1,
“WarehouseCode”: “001”,
“AccountCode”: “1.01.004.01.002”,

}

]
}

but now we need to add the batch number and I tried it as follows.

 https://xxxxxxxx/b1s/v1/InventoryGenEntries

{
"DocDate": "2025-03-22",
"DocDueDate": "2025-03-22",
"Comments": "Entrada automática por API - lote 1526",
"DocumentLines": [
{
"ItemCode": "410224",
"Quantity": 1,
"WarehouseCode": "001",
"AccountCode": "1.01.004.01.002",
"SerialNumbers": [
{
"ItemCode": "410224",
"SysNumber": 393,
"LotNumber": "15256",
"Location": "001",
"AdmissionDate": "2025-03-21T00:00:00Z",

}
]
}
]
} 

but I get the following error
"value": "10001172 - Blank strings are not allowed in row 1 (in unique field). [OSRN.SysNumber][line: 0]"
Please, if anyone can help me, I'd appreciate it. I'm really behind on this at work. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Error message when I use in enable now the function “...
entry.content:
Hi, i have also updated my service, but we still face the following issue in Postman:

{
    "message": "Forbidden",
    "status": 403
}
 
I first generate the token -> get the token -> do request to "https://{our region}.alm.cloud.sap/api/calm-projects/v1/projects" using the new token as Bearer -> returns 403

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
Hi @ernlin 

Please find steps for onboardee to login:

1.onboardee recieve welcome email from IAS .

2.candidate will set his pwd on register page:

3.Once they click on continue ,it will show account activated:

 

4.Once they further click on continue ,it take them to PDC page.

 

I dont find any technical challenges here from onboardee perspective . @smitajalit kindly correct me if my understanding is wrong. As per erlnin ,they need authenticator app by onboardee and am not familiar with this login type by onboardee

Thanks,

Gopi

entry.title: Re: Protection Groups with in an Supply protection object
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there is any way to increase number of buckets (55) ?

entry.title: Re: PhD in SAP material management
entry.content: Hi, @Margit_Wagner i have 5+years of experience in SAP Consulting firm. I have been looking for PhD but did not get any update.

entry.title: Re: Unable to invoice SO line items
entry.content: In general, system will allow to remove the deletion indicator from PO.  Not sure, whether you tried that or system triggered any error message in which case, please share that screen shot

entry.title: SuccessFactors Sync SF - Microsoft Entra - Multiple Employment/Contingent
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we have set up an integration between Successfactors and Microsoft Entra. The sync and writeback are also working for us so far. However, we are having problems with employees with multiple employment, employees who change from a fixed-term to a permanent contract and with contingent workers.

  • In the case of multiple employees, integration “rolls the dice” as to which employment is taken. As a result, it regularly happens that the inactive employment is synced and the account is deactivated in AD.
  • As soon as an employee's termination is deleted due to a permanent contract, the AD receives the value NULL for the expiration date. The value NULL does not overwrite the old value in the AD and must therefore be deleted manually.
  • In the case of contingent workers, we have no termiantion and therefore no termination date. The Work Order End Date can be used as a replacement.

Has anyone already gained experience with the integration and solved these challenges (via one application)? We would be very happy to hear from you.

Best regards
Sascha Grünner

entry.title: Re: Hi Priyanka,Just like UPDATE_INSERT, Do SAP CPI suppo...
entry.content: Thank you, Robert!

entry.title: Re: Manager View in MSTeams SuccessFactors App
entry.content:
Hi @VanessaLi, 

While searching through the community about some blogs about the Teams App I came to this page. We are currently looking into the Team App and we feel like it has a lot of potential.

One of the things we miss for managers today are the alerts. They are in the browser available under for you today. Like contract end date reminders. It would also be nice if a workflow is pending for a while that a reminder is put in the chat.

Not sure if these kind of things are on the roadmap to be added? And can you share a bit more about the new manager view in the app? When is it expected? Can we see it already somewhere?

And taking this opportunity as well to ask about the "Assisted Microsoft Teams App Chat". We saw this is now available to switch on, costing premium AI units. Is this similar to Joule functionality or is it something completely different? 

Appreciate your reply!

Kind regards,
Linda

entry.title: Automatic sending of SalesOrder messages from the S/4 HANA Public Cloud to SAP Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hello Community,

When a new SalesOrder message is created or updated in the S/4 HANA Public Cloud, I would like this message to be automatically triggered in the SAP Event Mesh and stored in the salesorder queue of the SAP Event Mash. I have already stored an “event mesh” system with the corresponding host and outbound communication (OAuth 2.0 via clientID and clientsecret from the event mesh) in the S/4 HANA Public Cloud under Communication Systems. I have created a sales order queue directly in the event mesh under the corresponding message client and stored the topic “sap/s4/beh/salesorder/created/v1”. What steps still need to be taken explicitly in the S/4 HANA Public Cloud so that the sales orders are automatically sent to the queue?

In general, I later retrieve the contents of the queue from the cloud integration via an AMQP adapter and then the other SalesOrder information using an OData call.

Thanks in advance and best regards

Michael Seydler

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager Gis Enhancement
entry.content: The default search is not based on geometry but based on description and related fields. You can check the metadata and search for "SearchFields" and modify those and check if that works but we can only search that's a direct property of the entity. So if you are searching for a geometry that's not a direct property of for example: MyWorkOrderHeaders, but a navigation property then it wont work.

entry.title: Getting 500 when opening page in Smartedit
entry.content:
When I am opening any page in smartedit, I am getting either 500 or 404. This is the error log for it

java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Value is instanceof Collection but cannot be empty collection for key: catalogVersions
at de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.FlexibleSearchQuery.addQueryParameters(FlexibleSearchQuery.java:170) ~[coreserver.jar:?]
at de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.impl.DefaultFlexibleSearchService.search(DefaultFlexibleSearchService.java:322) ~[coreserver.jar:?]
at de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.internal.dao.AbstractItemDao.search(AbstractItemDao.java:61) ~[coreserver.jar:?]
at de.hybris.platform.cms2.servicelayer.daos.impl.DefaultCMSPageDao.findPagesByLabelsAndPageStatuses(DefaultCMSPageDao.java:95) ~[cms2server.jar:?]

 

I have debuged it and found when code flows to this location - 

de.hybris.platform.basecommerce.strategies.impl.DefaultActivateBaseSiteInSessionStrategy#collectContentCatalogs

I am not getting current catalog here. My base site has two base store associated and each store has two catalog. While doing baseStore.getCatalogs(), first baseStore is returning two catalog but second base store is returning only one catalog instead of two.

Any idea what might be the issue here? I am stuck and not able to find the solution for it.

entry.title: Audit for identify login method changes (Employee Central - profile)
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have a case where the login method of the user were changed from SSO to PWD on the Employee Central profile. 

Is there a possibility to identify who and when the method got changed?

Thank you in advance for your guidance,

Eli

entry.title: How to start a career as a SAP Functional Consultant?
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAP community.

I just finished my master's degree in business and product management. During my studies, I found a keen interest in SAP, specially in S/4HANA.

Because of this, I am aspiring on becoming a functional consultant. To do so, I currently find myself doing the learning journey " Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA", plus an institutional overview course on SAP S/4HANA. My goal is to take the SAP Certified Associate - Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA.

Does this certificate covers the requirements to start a career as a functional business processes consultant in SAP S/4HANA? What else should I consider to start my career as a SAP S/4HANA consultant?

I appreciate in advance the support and guidance you may provide.

Best regards,

Erick Dos Santos.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
Hi @Gopinath,

Let’s assume that for employee login via IAS, 2FA is imposed as per best practice.

So are you saying there is separate configuration in IAS to turn off 2FA by default for Onboardees while keeping 2FA for employees?

In that case, what happens to Onboardee’s login after they become Employees on day 1?

Is there a separate IAS activation triggered that they have to do as Employees, this time with 2FA?

Do they use their business email to login to IAS as an employee?

This blog doesn’t close the loop to explain what happens after onboarding. All Onboardees become employees eventually.

entry.title: Re: Expiry Date Adjustment Upon HU Unpacking in EWM
entry.content:
Hello MahdiNaji,

I had the same requirement couple of years ago in a pharma company.
We search in EWM standard and couldn't find anything. Business also didn't want to create a new batch for the container which was just open.

So we create a Ztable with the HU and a "reduced shelf life" date.

After you have to use adjust some processes:

  1. Calculate the reduced shelf life during the opening process (for us it was sampling, partial picking) & update Z table
  2. Search - Automatically search and sort for the HU with reduced shelf life / normal shelf life (at batch level)
  3. Report to display the Reduced shelf life and block it when expired.

BR,

Emmanuel.

entry.title: Re: Manually Editing the Amount in Settlement Document| S...
entry.content: Normally REV1 is used as a final rebate amount for the entire contract. Technically you can use it at any other table, but this means that REV1 will apply to the specific line items of the settlement document which are matching to the table being used. REV1 is added in the contract manually, you cannot calculate it in standard.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content: @ernlin per my understanding 2FA is not yet supported for onboardee . Informed @smitajalit to provide her expert advise on this topic once.please wait for her inputs

entry.title: Re: I want “Setup” and “Processing” and “Labor” in COOIS...
entry.content:
Hi @SI_y_Ito ,

a report for comparing planned and actual activity confirmation for manufacturing orders is not available as of now. You could think of using extensibility options to create a custom report or creating a customer influence request.

Kind regards 

Franziska

entry.title: Re: Release Navigator for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition by SAP Enterprise Support
entry.content:
Hello Richard.

You can also visit this direct link:

https://support.sap.com/en/offerings-programs/enterprise-support/releaseready.html?anchorId=section_1626940755_c

entry.title: Yard Logistics: Self Check-In: Empty Error Message when SAP GUI/Launchpad is set to Language "DE"
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

I have an issue with the Self Check-In App in Yard Logistics.

Two different system behaviours:

  • SAP GUI/Fiori Login Language: EN (English)
    • Open Self-Check-In App
    • Choose Language German or English in Self Check-In App
    • Self-Check-In works without Error message

 

  • SAP GUI/Fiori Login Language: DE (German)
    • Open Self-Check-In App
    • Choose Language German or English in Self Check-In App
    • Type in Number of Yard Order
    • Go to Next Step
    • Register New Driver
    • Type in Forename and Surname of Driver 
    • Go to Next Step
    • Enjoy this Error Message: 

My guess is, that somewhere a translation or customizing regarding the german language is missing. But I couldn't find anything. Another guess is, that it could be a system setting, because the system language is the problem not the language in the app itself. 

Any ideas for a solution? Or any ideas where I could check settings?

Many greetings, 

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get co...
entry.content: Ok Thank you for the snapshot. Ieaxtly did what you shared. except the second restricted measure (no. of Goals) using no. of business goals to just exclude nulll value. This is where story report gets complicated and this part is not explained in any training that I went through. Once again thank you for the snap shots.

entry.title: Re: InventoryGenEntries with InternalSerialNumber
entry.content: Hi ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: Re: Onboarding New Hires Authentication using SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS)
entry.content:
@Gopinath not true, when I was enabling IAS for Onboardees for a customer back in 2023 after it was released, 2FA steps were required from Onboardees.

Which is why the customer decided it was too much of a hassle and risk and decided to turn IAS off for Onboardee and revert back to basic SF login.

That experience with my customer back in 2023 is also the basis for the comments I shared above.

entry.title: Output Channel from Output Channel Selection is not picked
entry.content:
You configured printer output channel for a document but it still send out the document by email.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Past 1 week fr 17-Mar-2025 i am waiting for my SAP Learning Hub Order confirmation email. Why DE
entry.content: SAP Store ID: 0002216077

entry.title: Re: Output Channel from Output Channel Selection is not p...
entry.content:
If you select i.e. for customer invoice a printer output channel in the output channel selection but on the account itself you maintain email for customer invoice documents this setting will overrule the output channel selection.

 

same for Purchase orders etc. on Supplier level under communication>Collaboration

entry.title: Re: InventoryGenEntries with InternalSerialNumber
entry.content: Hi ANKIT_CHAUHAN... I made the change in the general settings and changed it in the Unique Serial Numbers section to "Manufacturer's Serial Number" and with the new request body. { "DocDate": "2025-03-22", "DocDueDate": "2025-03-22", "Comments": "Entrada automática por API - lote 1526", "DocumentLines": [ { "ItemCode": "410224", "Quantity": 1, "WarehouseCode": "001", "AccountCode": "1.01.004.01.002", "SerialNumbers": [ { "ManufacturerSerialNumber": "1526", "InternalSerialNumber": "1526", "LotNumber": "1526", "AdmissionDate": "2025-03-25", "ManufactureDate": "2025-03-24" } ] } ] } I still have the error. "value": "10001172 - Blank strings are not allowed in row 1 (in unique field). [OSRN.SysNumber][line: 0]"

Ana Lousada

entry.title: Re: VPN Speed SAP DC (RISE Base Option)?
entry.content:
Hello.
I also had this question.
I asked this question via email to the PC3 team and got the answer below, it was a bit contradictory since the connection to SAP-DC is through IPSEC VPN.

entry.title: SAP Business One IAM / Service Layer get logged User
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need some help understanding how I can retrieve the user code of the logged-in user in my application, which is authenticated via Single Sign-On (SSO).

For clarity, here’s the scenario:

  • The user logs into my application via SSO.

  • The account used for SSO login is linked (in the Control Center) to a SAP user.

  • Sometimes, the SSO username does not exactly match the SAP username (or code), so I need to find a way to retrieve the linked SAP user.

I am able to obtain the logged-in username from my code by reading it from the authentication token (if you know of a call that does the same, even better), but I am unsure how to retrieve the linked SAP user.

I checked the database but didn’t find anything, nor did I find a relevant service layer endpoint.
Of course, I cannot use the "Users" endpoint since I don't have the SAP user details.

I appreciate any useful information in advance.

Thanks!

entry.title: Generative AI-Based Script Optimization
entry.content:
Authors: Marc Eiro, Mitko Kolev, Markus Muenkel, Syed Muhammad Kumail Raza

Product version 6.54 witnessed the first Generative AI feature to SAP Integration Suite, as described in the blog SAP Integration Suite – Generative AI based Integration Flow Generation. 

In product version 6.59 we are adding another Generative AI feature, which is dedicated to optimization of Groovy scripts. This feature is available with SAP Integration Suite, Premium Edition, on specific regions/data centres eu10, eu10-002, eu10-003, eu10-005, us10, us10-002. Roll-out has been performed in calendar week 50.

The enablement of Generative AI features is documented in above blog and product documentation. 

 

Introduction

In our previous blog Inspecting and Understanding Resource Consumption of your Integration Content we explained how to inspect the resource consumption of the integration flows. The Inspect feature (see https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/inspect) enables understanding resource-related issues and helps in mitigation by proposing adjustments in the integration content. This effectively constitutes a feedback channel from the operation phase back into the design phase. An end-to-end flow, from problem detection to problem resolution, was showcased in Michael Ameling's keynote at TechEd 2024. In this example, a memory problem was detected in the Inspect tool, and traced down to a Groovy script in one of the integration flows. The Script Optimization was used to improve memory consumption in that Groovy code, and after redeployment of the integration flow the Inspect feature confirmed that the memory bottleneck was resolved.

The Script Optimization feature is automating the proposals for improvements on resource consumption and compliance with best practices in Groovy scripts. This is achieved by using a LLM (large language model) that is grounded with best practices and design guidelines for integration content.

Following is a step-by-step description of how to use the feature.

 

Generative AI-Based Script Optimization

In order to use the feature, you have to display the integration flow in edit mode within Design view. When you open the Groovy code editor, the "Optimize" button is displayed:

The new "Optimize" button in the Groovy script editor

Clicking the "Optimize" button retrieves suggestions from Generative AI, which are based on best practices and design guidelines. The suggestions are shown in a "AI-Generated Review Report" after a short while:

The AI-Generated Review Report for the Groovy Script

This report consists of three parts:

General assessment
Either this assessment will confirm that the script adheres to guidelines and there would be no further suggestions for improvement. Otherwise it would summarise where the script might need improvement.

Recommended Changes
In this case the recommended changes are listed down, each coming with a title, explanation and a related code snippet.

Improved Script
Finally, a complete script is provided that showcases all of the above recommendations. Let's reveal it by scrolling the report to the bottom:

The proposal for an improved script

The user can choose to adopt individual recommendations, or the complete improved script, by copying the respective sections in the report and pasting in the editor.

This feature is currently provided on the basis of free and fair usage option. Due to this, there will be a certain usage limit per tenant per calendar month for next 6 months. If you exhaust this limit, this will be notified via a message saying "The AI request could not be processed because you have reached your fair usage token quota." when using the "Optimize" button. 

 

Conclusion

We introduced the Generative AI-based "Script Optimization" feature to help our customers optimizing their Groovy scripts for enterprise readiness by streamlining resource consumption and adhering to best practices. This feature facilitates the end-to-end action to insight cycle where issues at runtime are detected in the Inspect feature, traced to the root cause, are understood and fixed, and resolution can be ultimately validated in Inspect tool.

entry.title: Re: Project Budget Approval
entry.content:
There is a BPA developed on BTP that runs through an approval when the financial plan is uploaded to the project.

https://api.sap.com/package/sap.build.pa.content.projectbudgetapproval/overview

entry.title: Re: Set nobinpt via bdc_transaction (SAP standard form fo...
entry.content: Did you try to use opt-dismode = 'N' or 'P' so dynpros wont be displayed?

entry.title: Manually editing Prices of a sales quote in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello everyone and thank you very much in advance.
is it possible to manually modify the pricing of a sales quote after the external price request? SAP Sales Cloud # is integrated with SAP ERP, but the customer needs to be able to manually modify the prices on some occasio
If it were possible, how to configure it?
Thanks again

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI option is not showing in the Technology drop-...
entry.content:
Tcode : RZ11 
Parameter Name : sapgui/user_scripting
Current Value : true

entry.title: Re: How to master a successful on-premise H4S4 Migration: SAP ERP6 HCM to SAP HCM for S/4HANA (H4S4)

entry.title: Re: IDOC Extension
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi admire your patience
